steps.t: The ruffians' camp-site can be found north of Trader's Wharf. You should find the ruffians' camp-site on the shores of the Wildwood.
The ruffians' camp-site can be found north of Trader's Wharf. You should destroy the ruffians' camp-site.
The ruffians' camp-site can be found north of Trader's Wharf. You should destroy the ruffians' camp-site.
The ruffians' camp-site can be found north of Trader's Wharf. You should talk to the tomb-robber at the ruffians' camp-site.
The tomb-robbers' camp-site can be found in the Wildwood. You should find the tomb-robbers' camp-site.
The tomb-robbers' camp-site can be found in the Wildwood. You should summon and defeat the lead tomb-robber.
The tomb-robber camp-site can be found in the Wildwood. You should talk to the lead tomb-robber.
Enid Nettlesting can be found at Trader's Wharf. You should talk to Enid Nettlesting.
